body_txt: This trope has been popularized by classic film actress Veronica Lake , who showcased this hairstyle (at the time, it was called the "peek-a-boo") and created an image of sexiness and allure. These bangs are often associated with Femme Fatale , The Vamp , and other character archetypes that are known for using their sexuality and guile to get what they want. Bonus points if she's also redheaded . See also Hiding Behind Your Bangs , which is when bangs are used to symbolize a character being asocial in some way or that they are hiding a part of themselves from the outside world.
